text_original: It is better to leave a vessel unfilled, than to attempt to carry it when it is full.
text_normalized: It is better to leave a vessel unfilled, than to attempt to carry it when it is full.

text_original: If you keep feeling a point that has been sharpened, the point cannot long preserve its sharpness.
text_normalized: If you keep feeling a point that has been sharpened, the point cannot long preserve its sharpness.

text_original: When gold and jade fill the hall, their possessor cannot keep them safe.
text_normalized: When gold and jade fill the hall, their possessor cannot keep them safe.

text_original: When wealth and honours lead to arrogancy, this brings its evil on itself.
text_normalized: When wealth and honours lead to arrogancy, this brings its evil on itself.

text_original: When the work is done, and one's name is becoming distinguished, to withdraw into obscurity is the way of Heaven.
text_normalized: When the work is done, and one's name is becoming distinguished, to withdraw into obscurity is the way of Heaven.
